40, he will serve in various Government concerns and also start his own
enterprises, but none of them will be successful. By 42 he will get vexed and
reverfto his first position and thereafter things will take a good turn and he
will go on happily till his 60th year. He may not derive great happiness
through his wife or children. He can be free from all troubles by propitiating
Lord Siva by Rudrabhisheka:eremony. As Saturn contacts in his rounds the
Moon, Ketu, 'Mercury and Venus, he will be well versed in sacred ancient
texts.
CHART 188
This native's father will have won name, fame and honours from the
Royalty. The native will be happy with his mother and brothers.
